title: oenothera gouldii
intro: Oenothera gouldii, also known as evening primrose, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an omega-6 fatty acid with anti-inflammatory properties. Consuming Oenothera gouldii has been associated with various health benefits, including reduced symptoms of menopause, improved skin health, and relief from eczema and other skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as an oil, capsules, or tea, and is also used in topical creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
